title: Usopp Becomes Dressrosa's God
description: Pages 1–5 focus on usopp becomes dressrosa's god, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as after Sugar's defeat, the restored fighters and citizens flood Dressrosa with confusion while Usopp becomes the unlikely hero who broke the country's hidden curse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, it's all well and good that I've got away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But how am I gonna get out of this place?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't make it back through the hole we used to get in on my own... I know! There's meant to be a lift, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Seriously, though, what does frankly think he's doing?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nnyehh, Nnyehh, I hope you're all working hard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: this ain't some kind of show, you know! Behe- heheh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What are we going to do with all this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh, crap. Get back to work!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...somebody is standing up to the Donquixote family....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This has never happened before in all the eight years I've been a toy... I don't care who it is!! Just wreck this place for good!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Nnyehh, nnyeh, are these midgets trying to say something?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...they were saying that name before, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa, don't call for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: He's these dwarfs' ally that they were talking about, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: You're so stupid. Won't you die?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Buhehhh!! Like hell I will, you brat, behe- heheh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Then what, you think he's going to save you?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And not just us...!! Usoland will...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Even the toys...who are being forced to work every day here under- ground...!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: even our comrades who are being put to work as slaves in the factory....!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Even the toys who put on false smiles in the streets while inside they are crying...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Even the poor big humans who don't realise they have lost the ones they love....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: You've just been tricked again, haven't you?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: He's not coming to help you now when you're all lying defeated, is he...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: What more proof do you need?!!! Do you see a hero here?! Where is he, NYEHHH?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: He's off hiding somewhere laughing at you all right now!!! Behehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: You're honest little people, so I don't doubt there's "someone" out there...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: But he's just some coward who couldn't take the pressure!!! He won't help you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: I'm sorry to say he's pretty much right!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: You should all run for it, too!! Good luck, you guys!!

summary: Usopp Becomes Dressrosa's God develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Dressrosa Citizens, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
